ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot reacting to a biohazard symbol, conveying a sense of caution and alarm.  The sequence begins with arms at rest, then transitions to arms raised in a defensive posture, followed by a slight lowering of the arms as if assessing the threat, before finally settling into a cautious, observant position.  The use of both arms adds to the feeling of apprehension. The slight variations in joint angles and wrist positions help to create a more natural, less robotic movement.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, unaware of danger
both arms shoot up in alarm, recoiling from hazard
arms lower slightly, assessing the threat cautiously
arms settle, alert and watchful of a mind to the danger
